name: L2 throw-leak closure (DD-2): ws.onerror frameCount=0 routes through classifier
description: Pre-fix: ws.onerror fires before any frame, transport-ws.ts calls endWithError, processor.ts catches as temporary, rotation fires. Post-fix: ws.onerror sets wsErrorReason and calls endStream; SSE flush classifies as ws_no_frames + retry; soft-fail; finish emitted; processor.ts sees emptyTurnClassification metadata and returns false from isModelTemporaryError; no rotation.

messages.label: getSnapshot() returns TransportSnapshot { wsFrameCount: 0, wsErrorReason: 'WebSocket error', ... }
POST-FIX: returns false (causeFamily='ws_no_frames' detected); no rotation

name: L1 cache-equilibrium break (DD-1): predictedCacheMiss derives from observable cache state
description: Pre-fix: continuationInvalidatedAt sticky → predictedCacheMiss='miss' every turn → cache-aware compaction every turn → 36352 lock. Post-fix: derivePredictedCacheMiss checks lastFinished.tokens.cache.read; if non-zero, returns 'hit'; cache-aware compaction skips this turn; codex sees a different prefix; lock breaks.

messages.label: POST-FIX: continuationInvalidatedAt set BUT lastFinished.tokens.cache.read > 0 → return 'hit'
cache-aware compaction GATE NOT FIRED this turn (was firing every turn pre-fix)
response with cache.read = newValue (different from previous lock)
if N consecutive identical values, emit CacheEquilibriumDetectionEvent (forensic; should be RARE post-fix)

name: Pre-fix vs post-fix comparison (ses_204499 replay)
description: Same input session through pre-fix vs post-fix code paths. Pre-fix: WS truncation → throw → rotation → cold prefix on new account → loop. Post-fix: WS truncation → soft-fail with metadata → no rotation → same account stays → next turn has chance to make progress.

messages.label: ws.onerror frame=0 → throw → processor.ts catches → isModelTemporaryError true → rotate → cold prefix → repeat
ws.onerror frame=0 → wsErrorReason set + endStream → classifier → soft-fail finish → isModelTemporaryError false → no rotate → same account next turn
JSONL line: causeFamily=ws_no_frames, wsErrorReason='WebSocket error', logSequence increments — operator sees the cluster live but no rotation noise
rotation log: zero new entries within 60s of empty-turn JSONL line (M9 metric, regression watchdog)
